overview: Development of Inorganic and Metal-Organic materials addressing global challenges through materials science and photochemistry

researchThrusts.title: Photo-chemistry and Molecular Actuators
researchThrusts.description: Solid-state materials combining organic and metal-organic components using cycloaddition reactions ([2+2] and [4+4] dimerization) as primary tools for material transformation
researchThrusts.application: Converting light energy into mechanical movement through the photosalient effect, enabling development of molecular photoactuators
keyPublications: Light-driven flagella-like motion of coordination compound single crystals

researchThrusts.title: Battery Materials and Degradation Mechanisms
researchThrusts.description: Metal-ion battery systems (lithium-ion, sodium-ion, and variants) with focus on understanding degradation mechanisms limiting battery lifespan
researchThrusts.application: Developing strategies for extending operational lifetime in electric vehicles and power storage systems
